Through a wealth of scientific research and clinical studies, he reveals how grounding can alleviate a multitude of health issues, including heart disease, sleep disorders, inflammation, depression, anxiety, and attention disorders.

By simply embracing the Earth beneath our feet, we can tap into a reservoir of healing energy that restores balance to our physiology. Grounding promotes the release of endorphins, improves circulation, regulates heart rate, reduces stress, and enhances the quality of sleep. Moreover, it combats inflammation—the root cause of many chronic ailments plaguing modern society.

Don't let the hustle and bustle of modern life disconnect you from nature's healing embrace. Embrace the transformative power of grounding and embark on a journey towards optimal health and vitality. Experience the profound benefits of reconnecting with the Earth and reclaim your natural state of well-being.

seo.description: Reconnect with nature's healing energy through grounding with Dr. Sinatra. Restore balance, alleviate ailments, and thrive.

title: The Science of Sleep
subtitle: Stop chasing a good night’s sleep and let it find you (DK Science of)
author: Heather Darwall-Smith
description:
"The Science of Sleep" by Heather Darwall-Smith offers a refreshing perspective on the complex topic of sleep, reassuring readers not to panic about the consequences of insufficient or poor-quality sleep. Darwall-Smith combines scientific insights with natural self-help techniques to demystify the data surrounding sleep and empower individuals to improve their sleep habits.

Using a visual approach, the book presents information through infographics, graphs, and diagrams, making it easy for readers to understand the science behind sleep. Drawing on extensive clinical practice and the latest research, Darwall-Smith offers proven strategies for better sleep and debunks common myths and misconceptions.

Readers will gain a deeper understanding of the sociological, physiological, neurological, and psychological factors influencing sleep, as well as practical techniques for addressing underlying causes. By encouraging readers to make lifestyle changes to nourish their body clocks, Darwall-Smith empowers them to achieve better sleep naturally.

"The Science of Sleep" equips readers with the knowledge and tools to take control of their sleep habits and transform them for improved overall well-being.

seo.description: "The Science of Sleep" equips readers with the knowledge and tools to improve their sleep habits and transform them for a better well-being.

title: Suppressed Inventions and Other Discoveries
subtitle: Revealing the Worlds Greatest Secrets of Science and Medicine
author: Jonathan Eisen
description:
In a world where groundbreaking discoveries are stifled, a scientist's AIDS cure remains locked away, and archaeological treasures vanish mysteriously. Even the deaths of astronauts, critical of the space program, are dismissed as conspiracy theories. "Suppressed Inventions and Other Discoveries" uncovers the truth behind these hidden truths.

Jonathan Eisen unveils over forty stories of scientific suppression and misinformation. These accounts challenge blind trust in academic and political leaders, revealing how corporate interests and political maneuvering keep transformative innovations concealed. From medical breakthroughs sidelined by pharmaceutical giants to UFO cover-ups, the book sheds light on the secrets shaping our world.

From medical monopolies to UFO secrecy, "Suppressed Inventions and Other Discoveries" delves into the realms of science and energy. It exposes the collusion between academia and corporations and unveils alternative energy sources kept from the public eye. Prepare for a journey into the unseen forces shaping our technological landscape.

seo.description: Unveil the secrets of suppressed science and hidden truths in 'Suppressed Inventions and Other Discoveries' by Jonathan Eisen.

title: The Trillion-Dollar Conspiracy
subtitle: How the New World Order, Man-Made Diseases, and Zombie Banks Are Destroying America
author: Jim Marrs
description:
In "The Trillion-Dollar Conspiracy," Jim Marrs, renowned for his investigative prowess and provocative insights, presents a chilling thesis: the current economic downturn is not a natural occurrence but rather a meticulously orchestrated plot by a powerful alliance of government entities and multinational corporations. Drawing on his previous works like "Rule by Secrecy" and "The Rise of The Fourth Reich," Marrs delves into a realm where the New World Order, engineered diseases, and financial institutions behaving like "zombie banks" are not mere conspiracy theories but alarming realities threatening America's freedom.

Through meticulous research and compelling analysis, Marrs unveils a disturbing narrative of clandestine agendas and covert operations aimed at subjugating the masses. He argues that forces within the government and corporate sectors are colluding to manipulate global events, consolidate power, and erode individual liberties. From the manipulation of financial markets to the proliferation of man-made diseases, Marrs connects the dots to reveal a comprehensive picture of deception and control.

With his characteristic blend of bold speculation and documented evidence, Marrs confronts readers with uncomfortable truths and challenges them to question the prevailing narrative. "The Trillion-Dollar Conspiracy" serves as a wake-up call, urging readers to scrutinize the actions of those in power and resist the erosion of democratic principles. As Marrs shines a light on the shadows of deceit, he empowers readers to reclaim their agency and demand transparency and accountability from the institutions that shape our world.

seo.description: Through meticulous research and compelling analysis, Marrs unveils a disturbing narrative of clandestine agendas and covert operations.

title: Hydrogen Peroxide Cures
subtitle: Unleash the Natural Healing Powers of Hydrogen Peroxide
author: Sandi Lane
description:
Uncover the Remarkable Healing Properties of Hydrogen Peroxide! Hydrogen peroxide, with its chemical formula HOOH, has long been recognized for its diverse applications in medicine and industry. However, many experts believe its potential for healing extends far beyond its role as a disinfectant. In this comprehensive guide, we explore the myriad uses of hydrogen peroxide and its ability to cleanse, sanitize, freshen, and more. Best of all, it's affordable, widely available, and environmentally friendly. Let's delve deeper into its remarkable properties.

Here's a glimpse of what you'll discover:

- Insight into the Nature of Hydrogen Peroxide
- Safeguarding Your Health with Proper Usage
- Harnessing its Power for Wound Care
- Combatting Fungal Infections Naturally
- Dental Hygiene and Combatting Bad Breath
- Safe and Effective Ear Wax Removal
- Enhancing Food Safety Practices
- Purifying and Detoxifying the Body
- Additional Practical Applications for Everyday Life
... and so much more!

Don't miss out—get your copy today and unlock the full potential of hydrogen peroxide for a healthier, more vibrant life!

seo.description: Unlock the diverse healing potential of hydrogen peroxide! From wound care to food safety, discover its myriad uses for a healthier life.

title: The Case Against Sugar
author: Gary Taubes
description:
In his compelling exposé, Gary Taubes draws parallels between sugar and tobacco, highlighting their detrimental effects on health.

Taubes delves into the history of sugar, from its use as a preservative to its contemporary overuse in products like high-fructose corn syrup.

He explores the research on sugar addiction, obesity, and related health issues, correcting misconceptions and offering insight for informed decision-making.

With a blend of scientific rigor and accessible prose, Taubes sheds light on the pervasive influence of sugar in our lives and its impact on society's health.

seo.description: Gary Taubes exposes sugar's parallels to tobacco in his enlightening book. He traces its history and delves into its health impacts.

title: The Autoimmune Fix
subtitle: How to Stop the Hidden Autoimmune Damage That Keeps You Sick, Fat, and Tired Before It Turns Into Disease
author: Tom O'Bryan
description:
Autoimmunity, a pervasive yet often undetected condition affecting millions, manifests in various health challenges. Dr. Tom O’Bryan’s extensive research reveals that autoimmunity is not merely a single disorder but a spectrum, with symptoms that can take years to surface clearly. Despite its stealthy nature, autoimmunity is a leading contributor to chronic ailments like Alzheimer’s, Multiple Sclerosis, and diabetes, elevating it to the third leading cause of death.

Fortunately, Dr. O’Bryan offers hope through his groundbreaking approach outlined in "The Autoimmune Fix." This comprehensive guide unveils a multifaceted protocol designed to heal the autoimmune system, particularly emphasizing the pivotal role of gut health. With 70 percent of the immune system residing in the gut, addressing dietary triggers like gluten, sweets, and dairy is paramount in the initial phase of the program. Following this, the book delves into additional factors such as genetics and the microbiome, providing practical strategies for long-term wellness. "The Autoimmune Fix" empowers individuals to take charge of their health, offering insights and tools to reverse autoimmunity and regain vitality.

seo.description: Uncover the complexities of autoimmunity and its impact on health in "The Autoimmune Fix" by Dr. Tom O'Bryan.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description:
"The Selfish Gene" by Richard Dawkins is a landmark book that has become a classic in the field of evolutionary biology. Originally published over 40 years ago, it remains influential and relevant today, having been translated into numerous languages and earning critical acclaim worldwide.

In the book, Dawkins presents a revolutionary perspective on evolution, offering a gene-centered view that emphasizes the role of genes as the fundamental unit of evolution. He argues that organisms can be understood as vehicles for the replication of genes, placing the focus on the transmission of genetic information through generations.

Dawkins's writing is characterized by its imagination, power, and stylistic brilliance, making complex scientific concepts accessible to a wide audience. "The Selfish Gene" not only popularized the insights of Neo-Darwinism but also sparked significant debate and inspired new avenues of research in biology.

This 40th-anniversary edition includes a new epilogue from the author, reflecting on the enduring relevance of the book's ideas in contemporary evolutionary biology. It also features the original prefaces and foreword, as well as extracts from early reviews, providing readers with a comprehensive and insightful exploration of Dawkins's groundbreaking work.

As part of the Oxford Landmark Science series, "The Selfish Gene" is recognized as a must-read classic of modern science writing, shaping the way we think about evolution and genetics.

seo.description: "The Selfish Gene" by Richard Dawkins is a landmark book that has become a classic in the field of evolutionary biology.

title: A Hunter-Gatherer’s Guide to the 21st Century
subtitle: Evolution And The Challenges Of Modern Life
author: Heather Heying
description:
Discover a compelling journey into the intricate interplay between our ancient origins and contemporary challenges – and uncover actionable insights to navigate this dynamic terrain.

Despite residing in an era of unprecedented prosperity, our societal fabric feels frayed, our unity fragmented, and our well-being compromised.

While material abundance abounds, our political landscape appears adrift, while rates of despair, isolation, and chronic ailments soar. What lies at the heart of this dichotomy? And how can we chart a course forward?

Renowned evolutionary biologists Heather Heying and Bret Weinstein offer a lucid diagnosis: our modern existence clashes with the ingrained instincts of our primal selves. Our ancestors thrived in close-knit communities, yet today, many struggle to even recognize their neighbors.

Survival in ancient societies relied on a deep harmony with nature. However, today's lifestyles – from our diets and occupations to our exposure to artificial light – starkly deviate from millennia of evolutionary conditioning.

Drawing on their extensive teaching experience and immersive studies in Earth's diverse ecosystems, Heying and Weinstein delve into urgent social challenges of our time. From rampant sleep deprivation and harmful dietary patterns to detrimental parenting approaches and outdated educational paradigms, "A Hunter-Gatherer's Guide to the 21st Century" offers a roadmap grounded in scientific insights, empowering readers to cultivate a more fulfilled and enlightened existence. Embark on this illuminating journey toward a harmonious coexistence with our evolutionary heritage.

seo.description: Delve into modern ills with Heying & Weinstein's solutions. A Hunter-Gatherer's Guide confronts today's challenges head-on.
keywords: A Hunter-Gatherer’s Guide to the 21st Century

title: The Art of Mindful Living
subtitle: How to Bring Love, Compassion, and Inner Peace into Your Daily Life
author: Thich Nhat Hanh
description: Meditation, as taught by Zen master Thich Nhat Hanh, acts as a beacon, illuminating the shadows within our lives. Rather than suppressing negative emotions, Hanh advocates for mindfulness, allowing patience and appreciation to flourish. In "The Art of Mindful Living," recorded during a family retreat, Hanh shares traditional teachings that blend ancient meditation practices with contemporary challenges. The book provides practical guidance on meditation, breathing exercises, contemplation, and communication, fostering tranquility and love in our hearts and minds.

seo.description: Get mindfulness with Thich Nhat Hanh. "The Art of Mindful Living" offers practical guidance for meditation, breathing, and communication.

title: Breath
subtitle: The New Science of a Lost Art
author: Nestor James
description:
Delve into the captivating exploration of humanity's most essential yet often overlooked function in "Breath" by journalist James Nestor.

With twenty-five thousand breaths a day, breathing forms the cornerstone of our health and vitality. However, as Nestor reveals, modern humans have veered off course, losing touch with the fundamental art of breathing correctly, leading to profound consequences.

Embark on a global journey alongside Nestor as he uncovers the roots of this respiratory disconnect, from ancient burial sites to clandestine Soviet facilities, New Jersey choir schools to the bustling streets of São Paulo. Along the way, he encounters individuals delving into the secrets of ancient breathing practices like Pranayama, Sudarshan Kriya, and Tummo, while collaborating with pioneering pulmonary researchers to scientifically examine age-old beliefs about respiration.

Through meticulous research spanning millennia of medical texts and cutting-edge studies in pulmonology, psychology, biochemistry, and human physiology, "Breath" challenges conventional wisdom, illuminating the profound impact of even subtle adjustments to our breath on athletic performance, organ rejuvenation, and the mitigation of various health conditions.

Prepare to be enlightened as Nestor reshapes our understanding of this fundamental biological function, forever altering the way you perceive and engage with the act of breathing. After reading "Breath," you'll emerge with a newfound appreciation for the power of breath and the transformative potential it holds for optimizing health and well-being.

seo.description: Dive into the captivating exploration of breath in 'Breath' by James Nestor. Discover its profound impact on health and vitality.

title: Unlocking The Keto Code
subtitle: The Revolutionary New Science of Keto That Offers More Benefits Without Deprivation
author: Dr. Steven Gundry
description:
"Unlocking the Keto Code" by Dr. Steven Gundry offers a revolutionary perspective on the ketogenic diet, debunking common myths and providing a more balanced approach to reaping its benefits. Drawing on his extensive research, Dr. Gundry reveals the biological mechanism behind the success of keto diets: mitochondrial uncoupling. Contrary to popular belief, ketones alone are not sufficient to sustain the body long-term, and strict carbohydrate restriction can lead to muscle wasting and cognitive decline.

In this insightful and practical book, Dr. Gundry explains how to ignite the process of mitochondrial uncoupling without extreme carb restriction. Readers will learn how to incorporate plant-based foods and ketone-generating foods into their diet to unlock the benefits of ketosis. With food lists, hacks, and new recipes, "Unlocking the Keto Code" offers a balanced and enjoyable approach to going keto for weight loss and improved health. This book is essential reading for anyone who has struggled with traditional keto diets, as well as vegetarians, vegans, and individuals seeking a sustainable way to achieve ketosis.

seo.description: In this practical book, Dr. Gundry explains how to ignite the process of mitochondrial uncoupling without extreme carb restriction.

title: The Energy Paradox
subtitle: What to Do When Your Get-Up-and-Go Has Got Up and Gone
author: Dr. Steven Gundry
description: "The Energy Paradox" by Dr. Steven R. Gundry delves into the pervasive issue of fatigue plaguing many Americans. Offering a fresh perspective, Dr. Gundry connects immune dysfunction to symptoms like exhaustion, brain fog, and low metabolism. Drawing from his previous works on gut and mitochondrial health, he highlights how fatigue is often a signal of underlying health issues, particularly linked to inflammation and a leaky gut. Through clinical insights and practical advice, Dr. Gundry provides readers with tools to address these root causes, including strategies to increase mitochondrial energy production and nourish the microbiome. With the inclusion of 30 new Plant Paradox-approved recipes and guidance on energy-boosting foods, "The Energy Paradox" empowers readers to reclaim their vitality and well-being.

seo.description: Discover Dr. Gundry's insights on overcoming fatigue and reclaiming vitality while beating exhaustion, brain fog, and low metabolism".

title: The Plant Paradox Quick and Easy
subtitle: The 30-Day Plan to Lose Weight, Feel Great, and Live Lectin-Free
author: Dr. Steven Gundry
description:
"The Plant Paradox Quick and Easy" by Dr. Steven Gundry is a comprehensive guide designed to help readers quickly and easily adopt the lectin-free eating program outlined in his bestselling book, "The Plant Paradox." In this book, Dr. Gundry explains how lectins, a type of protein found in various foods, can negatively impact gut health, leading to inflammation and contributing to disease and weight gain.

The 30-day challenge presented in "The Plant Paradox Quick and Easy" provides readers with incentives, support, and practical tools to successfully transition to a lectin-free diet. Dr. Gundry offers grocery lists, meal plans, time-saving cooking strategies, and new recipes to simplify the process and make it more manageable. Additionally, the book provides guidance for individuals following specialized diets, such as ketogenic and vegan diets, as well as for families looking to embrace lectin-free eating together.

With a focus on making the transition as seamless as possible, "The Plant Paradox Quick and Easy" serves as a valuable resource for both longtime followers of the Plant Paradox program and newcomers seeking to improve their health by eliminating lectins from their diet.

seo.description: "The Plant Paradox" by Dr. Steven Gundry offers a 30-day guide to adopting a lectin-free diet. With meal plans, recipes, and tips.

title: The Longevity Paradox
subtitle: How to Die Young at a Ripe Old Age
author: Dr. Steven Gundry
description:
In "The Longevity Paradox," Dr. Steven Gundry introduces a groundbreaking approach to aging well, challenging the conventional notion that the decline associated with aging is inevitable. Drawing on his extensive experience treating mature patients, Dr. Gundry reveals that the so-called "diseases of aging" are not solely determined by chronological age, but rather by our lifestyle choices and their impact on the health of our microbiome—the diverse community of microorganisms residing within our bodies, particularly in our gut.

Dr. Gundry asserts that nurturing the health of our microbiome holds the key to aging gracefully and maintaining vitality as we grow older. From common ailments like arthritis to more serious conditions such as cancer and Alzheimer's disease, the state of our gut bugs significantly influences our overall health and quality of life as we age.

"The Longevity Paradox" offers a comprehensive nutrition and lifestyle plan designed to support gut health and promote longevity. Through simple yet effective strategies, Dr. Gundry empowers readers to take control of their health and well-being, providing actionable steps to prevent and even reverse age-related diseases. With insights drawn from the latest scientific research, this book provides a roadmap for anyone seeking to optimize their health and enjoy a vibrant, fulfilling life well into their later years.

seo.description: Dr. Gundry's "The Longevity Paradox" reveals aging isn't just about time passing; it's about our lifestyle's impact on our microbiome health.

title: Dr. Gundry’s Diet Evolution
subtitle: Turn Off the Genes That Are Killing You and Your Waistline
author: Dr. Steven Gundry
description:
In his groundbreaking book, renowned heart surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry unveils a research-based program designed to help you "reset" your genes, restore your health, shed excess weight, and prolong your life.

Losing weight and maintaining health can often feel like an uphill battle, but Dr. Gundry reveals that it's really a war against your own genes—honed by millions of years of evolution. To emerge victorious, you must outsmart them. Dr. Gundry's revolutionary approach challenges conventional wisdom and shares health secrets that other doctors often overlook.

Inside the pages of this transformative book, you'll discover:
- Why plants can be both "good" and "bad" for you, and why meat may not be as detrimental as previously thought.
- The significance of plateauing on this diet as a positive sign of progress.
- The surprising truth about artificial sweeteners and their effects on your health and weight.
- How commonly prescribed medications like antacids, statins, and drugs for high blood pressure and arthritis may be masking underlying health issues rather than addressing them.

In addition to providing a meal planner, 70 delicious recipes, and inspiring stories, Dr. Gundry offers easy-to-memorize tips to help you stay healthy and stay the course on your journey to optimal health. With Dr. Gundry's guidance, you'll gain the knowledge and tools you need to take control of your health, defy your genetic predispositions, and live your best life.

seo.description: Learn how to outsmart your genes, shed excess weight, and live longer with Dr. Gundry's revolutionary approach to nutrition.

title: Becoming the Ultimate Human
subtitle: Finding Answers to Anxiety, ADHD, Poor Sleep, Gut Issues and More in Your Genetic Code
author: Gary Brecka
description:
Challenge the conventional wisdom surrounding genetic diseases and unlock the truth about your health with the groundbreaking insights shared in this transformative book.

For years, we've been conditioned to believe in the concept of inherited diseases, attributing various ailments to specific genes within our DNA. However, Human Biologist Gary Brecka and Sage Workinger unveil a revolutionary perspective: diseases aren't inherited – genes merely influence how our bodies interact with our environment.

Drawing from over two decades of experience in mortality research and wellness advocacy, Brecka and Workinger offer a compelling narrative that empowers readers to take control of their health destinies. By understanding the intricate relationship between genetics, lifestyle choices, and environmental factors, you'll discover how to unlock your body's innate potential for optimal health and well-being.

Through personalized nutrition protocols, lifestyle modifications, and targeted supplements, Brecka and Workinger have helped thousands of patients transcend genetic predispositions and achieve vibrant health. Their approach, rooted in scientific research and real-life success stories, offers a roadmap to breaking free from the constraints of inherited disorders and embracing a life of vitality and longevity.

Whether you're struggling with anxiety, depression, digestive issues, or more serious conditions like cardiovascular disease or cancer, this book provides actionable strategies to optimize your genetic expression, elevate your mental and physical well-being, and unlock your full potential.

Embark on a journey of self-discovery and empowerment as you uncover the truth about your genes and chart a course towards a healthier, happier future.

seo.description: Challenge conventional wisdom on genetic diseases with Brecka's groundbreaking insights. Learn how genes can be improved for better health.

title: Blue Mind
subtitle: The Surprising Science That Shows How Being Near, In, On, or Under Water Can Make You Happier, Healthier, More Connected, and Better at What You Do
author: Wallace J. Nichols
description:
Dive into the groundbreaking insights of marine biologist Wallace J. Nichols as he unveils the transformative power of water on our health and well-being in his landmark book, "Blue Mind."

Have you ever pondered the magnetic pull of the ocean during summer? Or why simply being near water has a profound calming effect on our minds and bodies? Nichols challenges us to reconsider these questions, shedding light on the extraordinary benefits of our relationship with water.

Through a blend of cutting-edge neuroscience and captivating personal anecdotes from diverse individuals – including top athletes, esteemed scientists, military veterans, and talented artists – Nichols reveals how proximity to water can elevate performance, foster tranquility, alleviate anxiety, and enhance professional success.

"Blue Mind" not only underscores the intrinsic importance of our connection to water but also offers a transformative blueprint for cultivating a more fulfilling life on our beloved Blue Marble. Prepare to be inspired as Nichols guides you on a journey toward harnessing the rejuvenating power of water for a happier, healthier existence.

seo.description: Discover 'Blue Mind' by Wallace J. Nichols. Explore water's transformative power for health and well-being and its impact on our well-being.

title: The Dietary Cure For Acne
author: Loren Cordain
description:
With 174 scientific references, "The Dietary Cure for Acne" by Loren Cordain, Ph.D., offers a comprehensive approach to clearing up skin within 30 days.

Addressing all four known causes of acne, the book explains how diet influences hormones, fat types affect bacteria proliferation, and certain foods can impact pore function.

Chapter four delves into the mechanisms behind acne healing, detailing the role of IGFBP-3, IGF-1, and the enzyme ZAG.

Chapter six identifies 11 acne-promoting foods to avoid and provides an action plan for dietary changes.

The diet consists of two phases: Phase 1 focuses on attacking acne causes with specific nutritional tools, while Phase 2 maintains progress over the next three months and beyond.

Chapter seven provides details on "The Good Foods," including a sample menu and comprehensive information on recommended food choices.

By following the dietary guidelines outlined in the book, readers can prevent pore blockage, reduce oil production, calm inflammation, and combat bacterial infection associated with acne.

seo.description: Loren Cordain, provides a science-based plan to clear skin in 30 days, addressing acne causes and offering dietary solutions and results.

title: Living Water
subtitle: Viktor Schauberger and the Secrets of Natural Energy
author: Olof Alexandersson
description: This narrative unveils the remarkable journey of Viktor Schauberger, an Austrian naturalist and visionary who pioneered a groundbreaking understanding of natural energy. Through meticulous study of aquatic life and the natural water cycle, Schauberger uncovered profound insights into energy transformation, offering a new perspective on humanity's relationship with the environment. Schauberger observed that conventional approaches to energy generation, from hydroelectric power to nuclear fission, were not only damaging the earth but also undermining human cultures by working against the natural order. His keen observations led him to envision a path to restore fertility to the land and harmonize with nature's rhythms. As an inventor, Schauberger developed ingenious machines that promised to revolutionize various industries, including agriculture, horticulture, forestry, and aircraft propulsion. He pioneered water purification systems and explored the potential of air and water as alternative fuels for machinery. His groundbreaking discoveries in implosive energy and diamagnetism hinted at vast untapped possibilities, many of which remain to be fully realized.

seo.description: Viktor Schauberger's journey unveils insights into natural energy, urging harmony with nature for sustainable progress.

title: EMF*D: 5G, Wi-Fi & Cell Phones
subtitle: Hidden Harms and How to Protect Yourself
author: Dr. Joseph Mercola
description:
In his groundbreaking book, renowned health authority Dr. Joseph Mercola sheds light on the real dangers of electromagnetic fields (EMFs) and provides invaluable insights into how you can safeguard yourself against their harmful effects.

As electronic pollution becomes increasingly prevalent in our modern world, the hazards posed by EMFs are no longer confined to the realm of science fiction. With the advent of 5G ultra-wideband technology, these dangers have escalated to unprecedented levels.

Drawing upon extensive research from the scientific literature, Dr. Mercola offers a comprehensive understanding of EMFs, including where they are found in our daily lives and their profound impact on our bodies and minds. From cancer and heart disease to neuropsychiatric illnesses, the toll of EMFs on human health is undeniable.

Despite the overwhelming evidence of their harmful effects, the public has largely been kept in the dark about the true extent of this threat. However, Dr. Mercola empowers readers with practical knowledge on how to mitigate the damage caused by EMFs at a cellular level and provides actionable strategies for protection at home, work, and beyond.

With the imminent rollout of 5G technology, which promises unparalleled connectivity but also poses unprecedented risks, Dr. Mercola's book serves as a vital resource for anyone concerned about their health and well-being in the digital age. Don't wait until it's too late—equip yourself with the knowledge you need to safeguard yourself and your loved ones from the pervasive influence of EMFs.

seo.description: Dr. Mercola's book unveils the dangers of EMFs and offers practical strategies for protection in our digital age.

title: Fat for Fuel
subtitle: A Revolutionary Diet to Combat Cancer, Boost Brain Power, and Increase Your Energy
author: Dr. Joseph Mercola
description: For generations, the prevailing belief has been that cancer stems from genetic aberrations, attributing the disease to chromosomal damage within cell nuclei. However, what if this widely accepted notion is fundamentally flawed? What if cancer isn't primarily a result of genetic mutations, but rather a consequence of defective metabolism triggered by mitochondrial dysfunction? In a groundbreaking exploration, renowned natural health practitioner Joseph Mercola challenges conventional wisdom, proposing a revolutionary paradigm shift in our understanding of disease. In his seminal work, Mercola elucidates how nearly all ailments, including cancer, are rooted in disrupted metabolic processes rather than genetic predispositions. Central to this thesis is the pivotal role of mitochondria—tiny organelles found in abundance within our cells, responsible for generating the lion's share of our body's energy supply. When mitochondria succumb to damage and dysfunction on a large scale, optimal health becomes unattainable. Mercola compellingly argues that by addressing mitochondrial health through proper nutrition, individuals can exert profound control over their well-being. Contrary to conventional dietary recommendations, he advocates for a ketogenic diet—one characterized by low carbohydrate intake and high healthy fat consumption. This dietary approach not only optimizes metabolic pathways crucial for disease prevention and healing but also yields a myriad of additional benefits, ranging from cognitive enhancement to sustained weight loss. Through clear and rational discourse, Mercola elucidates the intricate molecular workings of the human body, empowering readers to comprehend the type of fuel their bodies are evolutionarily designed to utilize most efficiently. Providing practical guidelines for implementing and maintaining a ketogenic eating regimen, he offers a roadmap to immediate health optimization. Moreover, Mercola dispels the notion that metabolic mitochondrial therapy is a distant future prospect, emphasizing that individuals can embark on their journey toward enhanced vitality and longevity today. As readers delve into this enlightening narrative, they gain access to the forefront of a burgeoning discipline, poised to revolutionize healthcare paradigms and empower individuals to reclaim control over their health and vitality.

seo.description: Renowned health expert Joseph Mercola challenges conventional beliefs about cancer and disease in his groundbreaking book.

title: KetoFast
subtitle: Rejuvenate Your Health with a Step-by-Step Guide to Timing Your Ketogenic Meals
author: Dr. Joseph Mercola
description:
Introducing the paperback edition of a groundbreaking guide from renowned alternative health authority, Dr. Joseph Mercola. Dive into the transformative power of time-restricted eating and ketogenic principles, meticulously crafted to promote weight loss, treat disease, and optimize overall well-being.

Dr. Mercola's expertise shines through in this comprehensive yet accessible manual, shedding light on the remarkable health benefits that arise from strategically timed, short-term fasts. By seamlessly integrating fasting with a ketogenic diet, individuals can unlock their body's innate fat-burning capabilities, ward off insulin resistance, reduce inflammation, optimize brain function, and embark on a journey towards lasting wellness.

In this enlightening paperback, Dr. Mercola explores a myriad of topics, including the detrimental impact of modern food choices on our health, the physiological mechanisms behind fasting and stem cell activation, and the nuances of the cyclical ketogenic diet. Readers will gain invaluable insights into the safety and efficacy of fasting, along with practical strategies for implementing regular one-day fasts to support fat burning and detoxification.

Whether you're seeking to shed excess weight, enhance cognitive function, or combat chronic illness, this essential guide provides the tools and knowledge needed to embark on a transformative health journey. Join Dr. Mercola as he unveils the secrets to optimal health through the synergy of ketogenic living and strategic fasting.

seo.description: Unlock fat-burning and boost brain function with "KetoFast", Dr. Mercola's guide to time-restricted eating and ketogenic living.

title: Effortless Healing
subtitle: 9 Simple Ways to Sidestep Illness, Shed Excess Weight, and Help Your Body Fix Itself
author: Dr. Joseph Mercola
description:
In "Effortless Healing," Dr. Joseph Mercola illuminates the innate power of the body to achieve vibrant health effortlessly. Drawing on years of experience and cutting-edge medical insights, Dr. Mercola unveils nine simple secrets to unlocking a healthier, leaner you. These steps are not only easy to implement but also yield remarkable results, including:

- Enhancing water quality by adding ice cubes for improved structure
- Rethinking breakfast habits to support weight loss
- Embracing a high-fat diet for optimal health and disease prevention

With the fusion of Dr. Mercola's expertise and the wisdom of your body, "Effortless Healing" provides a roadmap to optimize health, weight, and overall well-being with ease.

title: Sweet Deception
subtitle: Why Splenda, NutraSweet, and the FDA May Be Hazardous to Your Health

title: Why Suffer?
subtitle: How I Overcame Illness and Pain Naturally
author: Ann Wigmore

Drawing from her experiences overcoming illness and pain, Wigmore shares her journey to health and vitality without relying on conventional medicine. This book guides readers on a path toward holistic wellness, learning about the importance of nutrition, detoxification, and self-care practices. With compelling anecdotes and practical advice, Wigmore inspires individuals to take charge of their health and explore alternative healing modalities. Whether dealing with chronic illness or seeking to optimize well-being, "Why Suffer?" offers valuable insights and encouragement for anyone on the path to natural healing.

title: School of Natural Healing
author: Dr. John Christopher
description:
"The School of Natural Healing 16th Edition" is the ultimate guide to herbal therapy, catering to teachers, students, and practitioners alike. Authored by the renowned Dr. Christopher, this comprehensive volume equips readers with the knowledge and skills needed to harness the healing power of herbs and plant-based remedies for medicinal care and curing. Whether you're dealing with infections or other health issues, this book provides invaluable insights into the world of natural healing.

Christopher Publications proudly presents this beautifully crafted edition, which combines Dr. Christopher's methods and famous formulas in an easy-to-use format suitable for both personal and classroom study. Expanded, revised, and updated, this edition promises to enlighten generations to come with its wealth of herbal wisdom.

For years, beginners and experts alike have turned to the School of Natural Healing for expert guidance on herbal therapies. The widespread distribution and use of Dr. Christopher's formulas are a testament to their success and safety. This latest edition includes a glossary of botanical terms, new formula names, and recipes for many formulas, ensuring that it remains an indispensable resource for herbal enthusiasts.

As testified by David W. Christopher M.H., this text is a go-to reference for usage, dosage, and plant identification. Dr. Christopher's legacy as one of America's greatest herbalists is solidified by this timeless classic, which brings the ancient art of herbalism into the modern era. Whether you're a seasoned herbalist or just beginning your journey, "The School of Natural Healing 16th Edition" is an essential companion for anyone interested in the healing power of nature.

title: The Cure for All Diseases
subtitle: With Many Case Histories
author: Hulda Regehr Clark
description:
In her groundbreaking book, "The Cure for All Diseases," Doctor Hulda Clark demystifies the causes of both common and extraordinary diseases, offering straightforward explanations and specific instructions for their cure using natural remedies and a DIY electrical device. Dr. Clark's approach is revolutionary in its simplicity, emphasizing the importance of identifying the true cause of illness in order to effectively treat it.

By delving into the root causes of various diseases, Dr. Clark sheds light on how seemingly disparate health issues can be traced back to common underlying factors. Armed with this understanding, readers are empowered to take control of their health and explore alternative healing methods that prioritize natural remedies over conventional medical interventions.

One of the key highlights of Dr. Clark's approach is her emphasis on building an electrical device at home, which she contends can play a pivotal role in combating illness. This innovative concept offers a holistic and DIY solution that bypasses the need for costly medical treatments and pharmaceutical drugs.

With her comprehensive guide, Dr. Hulda Clark challenges conventional wisdom and invites readers to rethink their approach to health and healing. "The Cure for All Diseases" serves as a beacon of hope for those seeking alternative paths to wellness and offers practical insights into the power of natural remedies and self-healing techniques.

seo.description: Dr. Hulda Clark challenges conventional wisdom and invites readers to rethink their approach to health and healing.

title: Hashimoto's Thyroiditis
subtitle: Lifestyle Interventions for Finding and Treating the Root Cause
author: Izabella Wentz, Marta Nowosadzka MD
description: "Hashimoto's Thyroiditis: Lifestyle Interventions for Finding and Treating the Root Cause" delves into the multifaceted nature of Hashimoto's beyond its conventional classification as hypothyroidism. Dr. Izabella Wentz elucidates that individuals with Hashimoto's often contend with an array of accompanying conditions such as acid reflux, nutrient deficiencies, anemia, intestinal permeability, food sensitivities, gum disorders, and hypoglycemia. These complexities perpetuate a cyclic pattern of immune system overload, adrenal insufficiency, gut dysbiosis, impaired digestion, inflammation, and irregular thyroid hormone release, leading to a cascade of symptoms. Dr. Wentz proposes lifestyle modifications to dismantle this cycle systematically, commencing with the elimination of triggers and progressing to the restoration of compromised bodily systems, thereby fostering equilibrium and enabling self-repair.

seo.description: "Hashimoto's Thyroiditis" delves into the multifaceted nature of Hashimoto's beyond its conventional classification as hypothyroidism.

title: The Healing Code of Nature
author: Clemens G. Arvay
description:
"The Healing Code of Nature" by Clemens G. Arvay explores the profound therapeutic potential inherent in the natural world. Arvay contends that nature harbors a vast reservoir of healing mechanisms that can positively influence human health and well-being.

Drawing on scientific research and ecological principles, the book illuminates the intricate interplay between humans and their natural surroundings, revealing how exposure to diverse ecosystems, plants, and organisms can rejuvenate the body, mind, and spirit.

Arvay offers insights into the therapeutic benefits of forest bathing, soil microbiota, biodiversity, and other elements of the natural world, advocating for a deeper connection with nature as a fundamental aspect of holistic healing. "The Healing Code of Nature" serves as a compelling testament to the restorative power of the environment and inspires readers to embrace nature's healing potential for optimal health and vitality.

seo.description: "The Healing Code of Nature" by Clemens G. Arvay explores the profound therapeutic potential inherent in the natural world.

title: Exercise is Medicine
subtitle: How Physical Activity Boosts Health and Slows Aging
author: Judy Foreman
description: "The Exercise Cure" by Judy Foreman delves into the profound mysteries of aging and explores the possibility of extending a healthy lifespan while minimizing the effects of senescence. Investigative health journalist Judy Foreman argues that exercise is a key factor in achieving this goal, highlighting its numerous effects on various molecules within the body. Drawing on research in evolutionary biology, exercise physiology, and geroscience, Foreman uncovers the mechanisms that make exercise a powerful tool for promoting longevity and overall well-being. The book addresses common questions about exercise, providing insights into its science and emphasizing its unparalleled effectiveness in enhancing health and longevity.

seo.description: The book addresses common questions about exercise, providing insights into its science and enhancing health and longevity.

title: The Secret Life of Your Microbiome
subtitle: Why Nature and Biodiversity are Essential to Health and Happiness
author: Susan L. Prescott
description:
"The Secret Life of Your Microbiome" by Susan Prescott is an illuminating exploration into the intricate world of the microbiome, the vast and diverse ecosystem of microorganisms that inhabit our bodies. Through meticulous research and compelling narrative, Prescott unveils the astonishing influence of these microorganisms on virtually every aspect of our health and well-being. From the moment we are born, our bodies are colonized by a plethora of bacteria, viruses, fungi, and other microorganisms that collectively make up our microbiome. Far from being mere passengers, these microscopic inhabitants play crucial roles in regulating our metabolism, modulating our immune system, and even influencing our mood and behavior. Prescott delves into the fascinating mechanisms through which our microbiome communicates with our cells, orchestrating complex processes that impact our overall health.
Get to know your body from the inside!
Drawing on cutting-edge research in microbiology, immunology, and neuroscience, Prescott paints a vivid picture of the symbiotic relationship between humans and their microbial companions. She explores the profound implications of microbiome dysbiosis—the disruption of microbial balance—for a wide range of health conditions, from digestive disorders and autoimmune diseases to neurological disorders and mental health issues. But "The Secret Life of Your Microbiome" is not just a journey into the mysteries of the microbial world—it is also a practical guide to nurturing and supporting our microbiome for optimal health. Prescott offers insights into dietary and lifestyle strategies that promote a diverse and resilient microbiome, as well as emerging therapeutic approaches aimed at restoring microbial balance in cases of dysbiosis. Through captivating storytelling and accessible science, Prescott empowers readers to unlock the secrets of their own microbiome and harness its transformative potential. Whether you are curious about the origins of human health and disease or seeking practical advice for improving your well-being, this book offers a wealth of knowledge and inspiration to embark on a journey of discovery and transformation.

seo.description: Susan Prescott delivers an illuminating exploration of the vast and diverse ecosystem of microorganisms that inhabit our bodies.
keywords: The Secret Life of Your Microbiome

title: Move The Body, Heal The Mind
subtitle: Overcome Anxiety, Depression, and Dementia and Improve Focus, Creativity, and Sleep
author: Jennifer Heisz
description:
In her groundbreaking book, noted neuroscientist Jennifer Heisz unveils revolutionary research demonstrating the profound impact of fitness and exercise on mental health. Drawing on cutting-edge studies, Heisz reveals how intervals of intense workouts and even leisurely walks can combat a range of mental health conditions, including anxiety, dementia, ADHD, and depression.

Contrary to popular belief, physical inactivity poses a greater risk factor for dementia and anxiety than genetics alone. Heisz explores how exercise's anti-inflammatory properties make it the most effective treatment strategy for depression, even for those who do not respond to traditional antidepressants.

"The Fitness Cure" offers practical insights into overcoming inertia and utilizing exercise to combat addictions. Heisz also delves into how exercise can improve memory as we age, enhance sleep quality, boost focus, and unleash creativity.

Included in the book are easy-to-follow plans for unique aerobic and resistance workouts specifically designed to strengthen the brain. With "The Fitness Cure," readers will discover a transformative approach to mental wellness, empowering them to unlock their full potential and lead happier, healthier lives.

seo.description: "The Fitness Cure" offers practical insights into overcoming inertia and utilizing exercise to combat addictions.
keywords: Move The Body Heal The Mind

title: The Humming Effect
subtitle: Sound Healing for Health and Happiness
author: Jonathan & Andy Goldman
description:
In their accessible guide to the practice of conscious humming, Jonathan and Andi Goldman unveil the transformative power of this simple yet profound sound. Humming, they reveal, is much more than just a soothing noise—it has the potential to deeply affect us on a physical, emotional, and spiritual level.

The Goldmans demonstrate that anyone, regardless of musical ability, can benefit from sound healing practices. Through conscious humming and breathing exercises, ranging from basic to advanced, readers can experience the therapeutic effects of this ancient practice. With online examples provided, individuals can explore the powerful vibratory resonance created by humming and tap into its healing potential for body, mind, and spirit.

Backed by scientific research, the authors explore the profound impact of sound healing on our physiology. They discuss how humming can reduce stress, induce calmness, enhance sleep quality, and even lower heart rate and blood pressure. Furthermore, humming has been shown to stimulate the production of beneficial neurochemicals such as oxytocin and endorphins, while also promoting lymphatic circulation and melatonin production.

Delving into the spiritual aspects of humming, the Goldmans examine its use as a sonic yoga technique and its significance in various world traditions, such as the Om or Aum chant in Hinduism and Tibetan Buddhism. They highlight how sound can serve as a powerful tool for manifestation and intention-setting, offering readers a self-healing method that is accessible to all.

Ultimately, "The Healing Power of Humming" invites readers to rediscover the innate ability we all possess to harness the healing potential of sound. Whether experienced as a form of relaxation, meditation, or spiritual practice, humming offers a simple yet profound path to holistic well-being and self-discovery.

seo.description: "The Healing Power of Humming" invites readers to rediscover the innate ability we all possess to harness the healing potential of sound.

title: Cancer and Vitamin C
subtitle: A Discussion of the Nature, Causes, Prevention, and Treatment of Cancer With Special Reference to the Value of Vitamin C
author: Ewan Cameron and Linus Pauling
description:
"Cancer and Vitamin C" delves into the complexities of one of the world's most pervasive diseases, exploring its causes and various treatment modalities. Authors Ewan Cameron and Linus Pauling shed light on the efficacy and limitations of conventional treatments like surgery, chemotherapy, and immunotherapy, while also advocating for the use of vitamin C as an adjunct therapy.

Drawing from clinical trials and case studies spanning several decades, the book presents a compelling argument for the therapeutic potential of vitamin C in cancer management. The 21st-Century Edition, updated by Stephen Lawson, synthesizes the groundbreaking research from earlier editions with recent molecular and clinical advancements.

Key highlights include the pioneering work of Mark Levine and his team at the National Institutes of Health, as well as clinical studies conducted at prestigious medical institutions worldwide, including M.D. Anderson Cancer Center, the Cleveland Clinic Foundation, and McGill University.

Now available in multiple languages, including Russian and Japanese editions, "Cancer and Vitamin C" remains the most comprehensive resource on the role of ascorbic acid in supporting cancer treatment. Offering a wealth of insights and evidence-based recommendations, this book continues to be an indispensable guide for patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals alike.

seo.description: The following book presents a compelling argument for the therapeutic potential of vitamin C in cancer management.

title: The War on Ivermectin
subtitle: The Medicine that Saved Millions and Could Have Ended the Pandemic
author: Dr. Pierre Kory
description:
“Dr. Pierre Kory is one of the heroic figures of our time; a courageous physician who sacrificed career, reputation, friendships, status, and livelihood for the health of his patients and humanity.” —Robert F. Kennedy Jr., founder of Children’s Health Defense and author of The Real Anthony Fauci
Big Pharma and health agencies cry, “Don’t take ivermectin!” A media storm follows. "Why then, does the science say the opposite?”
Ivermectin is a dirty word in the media. It doesn’t work. It’s a deadly horse dewormer. Prescribe or promote it and you’ll be called a right-wing quack, be banned from social media, or lose your license to practice medicine. And yet, entire countries wiped out the virus with it, and more than ninety-five studies now show it to be unequivocally effective in preventing and treating Covid-19. If it didn’t work, why was there a coordinated global campaign to cancel it? What’s the truth about this decades-old, Nobel Prize-winning medication? The War on Ivermectin is the personal and professional narrative of Dr. Pierre Kory and his crusade to recommend a safe, inexpensive, generic medicine as the key to ending the pandemic. Written with Jenna McCarthy, Dr. Kory’s story chronicles the personal attacks, professional setbacks, and nefarious efforts of the world’s major health agencies and medical journals to dismiss and deny ivermectin’s efficacy. Part personal narrative, part scathing expose, The War on Ivermectin highlights the catastrophic impacts of the mass media censorship and relentless propaganda that led to the greatest humanitarian crisis in history. Although numerous studies and epidemiologic data have shown that millions of lives were saved globally with the systematic use of ivermectin, many more millions perished. This carnage was the direct result of what Dr. Kory eventually discovered to be the pharmaceutical industry’s silent but deadly war on generic medicines and the corrupt, captured medical and media systems that allow it to continue. For anyone who thought Covid-19 was the enemy, Dr. Kory’s book will leave no doubt that the true adversary in this war is a collective cabal of power-hungry elites who put profits over people and will stop at nothing in their quest for control. The War on Ivermectin is published through ICAN PRESS, an imprint of Skyhorse Publishing. ICAN (Informed Consent Action Network) is a nonprofit organization investigating the safety of medical procedures, pharmaceutical drugs, and vaccines while advocating for people’s right to informed consent.

title: The Gerson Therapy
subtitle: The Proven Nutritional Program to Fight Cancer and Other Illnesses
author: Charlotte Gerson

But now, The Gerson Therapy® offers hope for those seeking relief from hundreds of different diseases. One of the first alternative cancer therapies, The Gerson Therapy® has successfully treated thousands of patients for over 60 years and has clinic locations around the country. The definitive natural cancer and chronic illness guide, alternative medicine therapist Charlotte Gerson and medical journalist Morton Walker reveal the powerful healing effects of nutrition, organic foods, food preparation, meal planning, and supplements combined to treat a variety of ailments. title: Vegucation Over Medication
subtitle: The Myths, Lies, And Truths About Modern Foods And Medicines
author: Dr. Bobby Price
description: At the height of medical technology and civilization, America has become the fattest and sickest nation ever to grace the earth. There was a time when food was our medicine, and the farmer our physician. But now industrialization has converted farms into factories, replaced produce for processed foods, and meat comes with just as many warnings as the drugs we are prescribed. If we continue to embrace the Standard American Diet (SAD diet) and current health care system, this may be the first generation of parents to outlive their children. The science and medical community are split 50/50 as to why we are so sick. One side is dogmatically attached to the theory that germs cause disease, so sickness is inevitable and can only be treated not cured. The other perspective is that we have a genetic predisposition to disease and that science & technology provide the solution. However, neither of these philosophies actually address the real cause of disease. Vegucation Over Medication bridges the gap by helping us understand the impact of nutrition on our health. Dr. Bobby Price provides actionable advice on how to prevent and even reverse many chronic diseases. The book dispels in shocking detail many of the myths and lies we’ve adopted as truths, such as the use of medications as our primary form of prevention. Dr. Price’s holistic approach to understanding the healing nature of our foods and bodies will empower you to cleanse, nourish, and RECLAIM YOUR HEALTH. In this book you will learn:• Hidden dangers in foods and medicines • How to minimize or eliminate medications • The connection between disease and nutrition • The secrets of long-term natural weight loss • The real scoop on protein • Powerful natural alternatives to help restore the body • Guide to incorporating a plant-based lifestyle • Tasty plant-based alternatives to your favorite foods • How a plant-based diet improves energy, digestion, and sleep • How to reverse Type 2 Diabetes • Keys to normalizing blood pressure and cholesterol levels

title: Built from Broken
subtitle: A Science-Based Guide to Healing Painful Joints, Preventing Injuries, and Rebuilding Your Body
author: Scott Hogan
description:
Heal painful joints, prevent injuries, and rebuild your body from the ground up. (If mainstream fitness advice has left you broken down and beat up, it’s time for a new strategy.) Most middle-aged fitness enthusiasts and athletes have been dragged down by joint pain, injuries, and other ailments commonly accepted as “part of getting older.” But it doesn’t have to be this way. In fact, anyone can conquer joint pain and rebuild their body. It simply requires understanding the hidden causes and a road map (this book) that leads to the solution. Built from Broken presents a paradigm shift in how to think about corrective exercise, sports nutrition, and joint health. Once you see how the system works, you’ll never look at exercise or joint health the same way again. Part 1 lays the foundation for understanding why your joints are breaking down. You’ll learn:
  • The 5 primary causes of joint pain.
  • How to prevent the “Big 3” injuries that trap you in the Pain/Injury Cycle.
  • Why conventional pain management merely masks symptoms (and 3 natural pain relief techniques that actually work).
  • How to identify and fix muscle imbalances that lead to tension, pain, and injuries.
  • Natural injury recovery strategies that improve healing time and tissue repair quality.
Part 2 gives you a step-by-step corrective exercise guide and list of action steps to rebuild your body from the ground up. Including:
  • The ideal training schedule to maximize muscle recovery and connective tissue repair (in as little as 2 days per week, at any age).
  • Illustrated corrective exercise instructions (with several home workout options).
  • How to strengthen joints with cutting-edge connective tissue training techniques.
  • A step-by-step training program complete with workout routines.
Whether you have been training for a few years, a few decades, or have never stepped foot in a weight room, it’s not too late to overhaul your body. If the conventional path of lifting and stretching has left you broken down, why not try a new strategy? This book is your way out of the pain/injury cycle. All you have to do is follow three simple steps.
  1. Read the book.
  2. Follow the action steps inside to resolve your pain.
  3. Implement the 4-week corrective training program outlined in the book.
Just imagine, in 4-8 weeks from now, you could be in a pain-free, mobile, strong, and functional body. One that allows you to do the activities you love, push the limits of your capabilities, and achieve your true physical potential. This process can start for you right now. All you have to do is click the “buy” button and order your copy of Built from Broken.
